# Hive Clinic

> Aesthetics and skin clinic in Manchester City Centre offering lip fillers, anti-wrinkle consultations, dermal filler, HydraFacial, chemical peels, skin boosters and more. Located at 25 Saint John Street, Deansgate.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of treatments, offers and clinic information.
- [Treatments](/treatments): Full directory of treatments and pricing.
- [Lip Fillers Manchester](/treatments/lip-fillers-manchester): Natural-looking lip filler from £100.
- [Anti-Wrinkle Consultation Manchester](/treatments/anti-wrinkle-injections-manchester): Wrinkle relaxing treatment consultation by a qualified prescriber.
- [Dermal Filler Manchester](/treatments/dermal-filler-manchester): Cheek, jawline, chin and tear trough filler.
- [HydraFacial Manchester](/treatments/hydrafacial-manchester): Deep-cleansing hydrating facial with no downtime.
- [Chemical Peels Manchester](/treatments/chemical-peels-manchester): Level 1 and Level 2 peels for texture, tone and pigmentation.
- [Skin Boosters Manchester](/treatments/skin-boosters-manchester): Profhilo and Seventy Hyal injectable hydrators.
- [Fat Dissolving Manchester](/treatments/fat-dissolving-manchester): Targeted fat dissolve injections.
- [Microneedling Manchester](/treatments/microneedling-manchester): Collagen induction therapy for skin renewal.
- [Facial Balancing Manchester](/treatments/facial-balancing-manchester): Full-face filler treatment plans.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Up-to-date treatment pricing.
- [About](/about): Practitioner and clinic story.
- [Results](/results): Before and after gallery.
- [Blog](/blog): The Hive Edit - aesthetic guides and tips.
- [Bookings](/bookings): Book an appointment online.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact details and enquiry form.
- [Aftercare](/aftercare): Aftercare instructions for every treatment.
- [Content Models](/content-models): Apply to be a content model at reduced rates.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Booking and clinic terms.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and GDPR information.
